nodes.name: Otus
nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: Wetar scops owl
nodes.summary: The Wetar scops owl (Otus tempestatis) is an owl endemic to Wetar of the Maluku Islands of Indonesia. It was previously considered a subspecies of the Moluccan scops owl (O. magicus), but was split as a distinct species by the IUCN Red List and BirdLife International in 2014, and the International Ornithological Congress followed suit in 2022. References
